questions.question: A library management system will be developed to track the borrowing and return of books. Derive both functional and nonfunctional requirements for this system. Please provide at least two functional and two nonfunctional requirements. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Use the given scenario to identify the requirements.

questions.question: Design a database schema for the library management system. Derive both functional and nonfunctional requirements from this schema. Please provide at least two functional and two nonfunctional requirements. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Use the database schema to identify the requirements.

questions.question: An e-commerce website will be developed to sell books online. Derive both functional and nonfunctional requirements for this website. Please provide at least two functional and two nonfunctional requirements. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Use the given scenario to identify the requirements.
